scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy ./dist --project-name=monabeauty2
scripts.db:migrate: npx wrangler d1 execute monastudio-v2-db --remote --file migrations/0001_sprint3_webshop.sql
scripts.db:reset: npx wrangler d1 execute monastudio-v2-db --remote --file migrations/9999_reset_seed_data.sql
scripts.db:reseed: npm run db:reset && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 execute monastudio-v2-db --local --file migrations/0001_sprint3_webshop.sql
scripts.db:reset:local: npx wrangler d1 execute monastudio-v2-db --local --file migrations/9999_reset_seed_data.sql
scripts.db:reseed:local: npm run db:reset:local && npm run db:seed:local
